creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178690
Use archivers/libunrar5

Use archivers/libunrar5 for the unrar library. This is the last port depending on the ancient version provided by archivers/libunrar.

Build tests succeeded on 10.3 and 11.0 i386.
Run tests extracting a few .rar files in doublecmd succeeded on 11.0 i386.
